tools.name: run_workflow
tools.description: Launch an autonomous, multi-agent workflow from a script you author (or by saved name); returns a runId immediately and notifies this conversation on completion. See SKILL.md for the full script-authoring contract.

script.description: Inline workflow source (JavaScript/TypeScript) following the authoring contract. Provide this OR name, not both.

name.description: Name of a previously saved workflow to run. Provide this OR script, not both.

args.description: Verbatim input object exposed to the script as `args`. Pass timestamps/seeds here (the script may not generate them).

capabilities.description: Per-run capability grant (the single consent point). Leaves get a read-only baseline by default.

tools.description: Side-effecting tool names granted to leaves on top of the read-only baseline.

hostFunctions.description: Host-function names the run may invoke.

persona.description: Grant leaves access to persona (identity + memory) context.

label.description: Human-readable label for display; defaults to the script's meta.name.

tools.name: manage_workflows
tools.description: Inspect or control workflow runs started by run_workflow: status, get_result (the full result of a finished run — the completion notification truncates large results), abort, resume, list_runs, and list_profiles. See SKILL.md for details.
